description: Siphon Life deals more damage, heals more, reaches further, and costs less mana. Adds an extra chain target when paired with Chain Siphon.
tooltipTemplate: Siphon Life: {damageMultiplier:1}× damage, {healingMultiplier:1}× healing, {rangeMultiplier:1}× range, {manaCostMultiplier:1}× mana cost per tick. With Chain Siphon: +{chainAdditionalTargetBonus:0} chain target.
